title: Ashswagg's Stasis Rod
description: All this mod does is gives you the rod Ashswagg used to stasis his members into the void. Do /giveTeleportRod and pull a player with it to send them to the void.
body: All this mod does is gives you the rod Ashswagg used to stasis his members into the void. Do /giveTeleportRod and pull a player with it to send them to the void. If you've ever watched the Unstable SMP mafia arc, and saw Ashswagg use a fishing rod on a mafia member, this is what that is but not complicated redstone.
